requirement_topic.en: Grid Interconnection Requirements for PV Inverters — Romania (ANRE / Transelectrica / 230 V 50 Hz)
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器并网要求——罗马尼亚（ANRE / Transelectrica / 230 V 50 Hz）
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器並網要求——羅馬尼亞（ANRE / Transelectrica / 230 V 50 Hz）

summary.en: PV inverters connecting to the Romanian grid must comply with EN 50549-1:2019 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase, adopted as SR EN 50549-1 by ASRO) or EN 50549-2:2019 (medium voltage, SR EN 50549-2) for anti-islanding, voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power capability, and reconnection. Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (RfG) is directly binding for generating modules above ANRE-set thresholds. ANRE Order No. 30/2013 (Codul tehnic al rețelei electrice de distribuție, CRED) and Transelectrica grid code (CTET) specify national requirements. The Romanian grid nominal voltage is 230/400 V 50 Hz — China's nominal 220/380 V differs; inverters must be re-parameterised. IEC 61727:2004 and IEC 62116:2014 (anti-islanding) are referenced in grid-connection certification processes by Romanian DNOs.
summary.zh: 接入罗马尼亚电网的光伏逆变器须符合EN 50549-1:2019（低压，≤16 A/相，ASRO采标为SR EN 50549-1）或EN 50549-2:2019（中压，SR EN 50549-2），涵盖防孤岛、电压/频率穿越、无功功率能力和重新并网要求。欧盟法规2016/631（RfG）对超过ANRE设定门槛的发电模块直接具有约束力。ANRE第30/2013号令（CRED）和Transelectrica电网规范（CTET）规定了国家层面的并网要求。罗马尼亚电网名义电压为230/400 V、50 Hz，与中国220/380 V有所不同；逆变器须重新参数化。罗马尼亚配电网运营商在并网认证过程中参考IEC 61727:2004和IEC 62116:2014（防孤岛）。
summary.zht: 接入羅馬尼亞電網的光伏逆變器須符合EN 50549-1:2019（低壓，≤16 A/相，ASRO採標為SR EN 50549-1）或EN 50549-2:2019（中壓，SR EN 50549-2），涵蓋防孤島、電壓/頻率穿越、無功功率能力和重新併網要求。歐盟法規2016/631（RfG）對超過ANRE設定門檻的發電模組直接具有約束力。ANRE第30/2013號令（CRED）和Transelectrica電網規範（CTET）規定了國家層面的並網要求。羅馬尼亞電網名義電壓為230/400 V、50 Hz，與中國220/380 V有所不同；逆變器須重新參數化。羅馬尼亞配電網運營商在並網認證過程中參考IEC 61727:2004和IEC 62116:2014（防孤島）。

standards_or_laws: ANRE Order No. 30/2013 — Codul tehnic al rețelei electrice de distribuție (CRED)
Transelectrica — Codul tehnic al rețelei electrice de transport (CTET)
IEC 61727:2004 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems – Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 62116:2014 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters – Test procedure of islanding prevention measures

summary.en: GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical requirements for connecting photovoltaic power station to power system, superseding GB/T 19964-2012) and NB/T 32004-2018 (Technical specification for photovoltaic grid-connected inverters) are the primary Chinese standards for PV grid connection. These are calibrated to China's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid, State Grid and Southern Grid connection rules, and Chinese anti-islanding thresholds. They do not address Romania's 230/400 V nominal voltage, EN 50549-1/-2 ride-through and reconnection profiles, ANRE CRED provisions, or Transelectrica CTET reactive-power requirements.
summary.zh: GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，取代GB/T 19964-2012）和NB/T 32004-2018（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）是中国光伏并网的主要标准，针对中国220/380 V、50 Hz电网及国家电网、南方电网并网规则和防孤岛门限进行了校准。上述标准不涵盖罗马尼亚230/400 V名义电压、EN 50549-1/-2穿越和重新并网曲线、ANRE CRED条款或Transelectrica CTET无功功率要求。
summary.zht: GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，取代GB/T 19964-2012）和NB/T 32004-2018（光伏並網逆變器技術規範）是中國光伏並網的主要標準，針對中國220/380 V、50 Hz電網及國家電網、南方電網並網規則和防孤島門限進行了校準。上述標準不涵蓋羅馬尼亞230/400 V名義電壓、EN 50549-1/-2穿越和重新併網曲線、ANRE CRED條款或Transelectrica CTET無功功率要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — Technical requirements for connecting photovoltaic power station to power system (recommended national standard)
NB/T 32004-2018 — Technical specification for photovoltaic grid-connected inverters

gap.en: Chinese PV inverters certified only to GB/T 19964 and NB/T 32004 are not validated for EN 50549-1/-2 (SR EN), EU RfG 2016/631, ANRE CRED, or Transelectrica CTET grid-interconnection requirements. Nominal voltage re-parameterisation from 220/380 V to 230/400 V is required and must be re-tested. Anti-islanding thresholds, reactive-power curves, and ride-through profiles per EN 50549-1 differ from Chinese equivalents. Romanian-language grid-connection application documentation is required by ANRE and DNOs.
gap.zh: 仅依据GB/T 19964和NB/T 32004认证的中国光伏逆变器，未经EN 50549-1/-2（SR EN）、欧盟RfG 2016/631、ANRE CRED或Transelectrica CTET并网要求验证。须将名义电压从220/380 V重新参数化至230/400 V并重新测试。EN 50549-1规定的防孤岛门限、无功功率曲线和穿越曲线与中国等效标准存在差异。ANRE和配电网运营商要求提供罗马尼亚语并网申请文件。
gap.zht: 僅依據GB/T 19964和NB/T 32004認證的中國光伏逆變器，未經EN 50549-1/-2（SR EN）、歐盟RfG 2016/631、ANRE CRED或Transelectrica CTET並網要求驗證。須將名義電壓從220/380 V重新參數化至230/400 V並重新測試。EN 50549-1規定的防孤島門限、無功功率曲線和穿越曲線與中國等效標準存在差異。ANRE和配電網運營商要求提供羅馬尼亞語並網申請文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 50549-1/-2 (as SR EN) and EU RfG 2016/631 are binding for grid connection in Romania. ANRE CRED and Transelectrica CTET are mandatory national grid codes. Romanian-language documentation is required by ANRE and DNOs.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 19964-2024 is a recommended (推荐性) national standard. NB/T 32004-2018 is a recommended energy industry standard. Compliance is effectively required by State Grid and Southern Grid connection rules within China.

source.publisher: Transelectrica SA (Romanian electricity transmission system operator)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PV inverters certified only to GB/T 19964 and NB/T 32004 are NOT compliant for Romanian grid connection. Full re-testing to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 (SR EN), EU RfG 2016/631, and ANRE/Transelectrica grid codes is required. Voltage nominal re-parameterisation and Romanian-language documentation are also required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 19964和NB/T 32004认证的中国光伏逆变器不符合罗马尼亚并网要求。在接入罗马尼亚电网前，须按EN 50549-1/-2（SR EN）、欧盟RfG 2016/631及ANRE/Transelectrica电网规范进行完整重新测试，并须进行名义电压重新参数化及准备罗马尼亚语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 19964和NB/T 32004認證的中國光伏逆變器不符合羅馬尼亞並網要求。在接入羅馬尼亞電網前，須按EN 50549-1/-2（SR EN）、歐盟RfG 2016/631及ANRE/Transelectrica電網規範進行完整重新測試，並須進行名義電壓重新參數化及準備羅馬尼亞語文件。
